title: bitshift~

methods.description: specifies number and direction of shift - positive values shift that number of bits to the left while negative shift to the right

body: [bitshift~] takes a signal and performs Bitwise Shifting (shift bit values to the left or right) depending on a shift value (positive values shift that number of bits to the left, while negative values shift to the right). The operation is done in two modes (see help file).
